## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] `npm test` passes (set `TEST_DATABASE_URL` so the database suite runs)
- [ ] Added or updated a test that fails without this change
- [ ] No secrets, `.env*`, or anything under `.data/` committed
- [ ] Docs updated if setup or behavior changed
